slides.headline: Unlock MHA Calculations
slides.body: Master MHA rules for online, in-person, and hybrid courses.

slides.headline: Understand MHA Basics
slides.body: Learn the core MHA principles and how they apply to different learning formats.

slides.headline: Online Course Considerations
slides.body: Explore the unique MHA rules for fully online courses and their impact on student benefits.

slides.headline: In-Person Course Rules
slides.body: Discover the specific MHA rules for in-person courses and how they differ from online courses.

slides.headline: Hybrid Course Calculations
slides.body: Learn how to apply MHA rules to hybrid courses that combine online and in-person elements.

slides.headline: Stay Compliant with MHA
slides.body: Ensure accurate MHA calculations and stay compliant with VA regulations.

outline.caption: Unlock MHA Calculations for Online, In-Person, and Hybrid Courses. Step-by-step guide to mastering MHA rules for student veterans. Stay compliant with VA regulations. Link in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 4, as it could benefit from a more concise headline to better summarize the content.
